title: MineCut PRO
description: The Ultimate Modpack for Minecraft Content Creators
body:
MineCut PRO Is a Modpack created to help players bring their cinematic Minecraft dreams to life! Whether you are a streamer, YouTuber, Short Film creator, or you just want to make a cool timelapse video for your friends - This is the Modpack to do that!

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/2fkoBqwlSdQ" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

With MineCut PRO, you can;

- Make building timelapses using "ReplayMod"
- Document epic fights/fighting scenes using "ReplayMod"
- Take stylised Film photos using the "Exposure" mod
- Showcase shaders, resource packs and beautiful scenery
- Create scenes with as many players as you want building, moving, fighting and more using the "Motion Capture" Mod

And much, much more!

MineCut PRO has shaderpacks and resource packs that come preinstalled, such as;

- Barebones
- Fresh Moves
- Fresh Animations
- Complementary Shaders
- BSL Shaders
- Bliss Shaders

And More!
